ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement was taken */,
  "sand_sf_inner" REAL /* Measurement of inner sand sample fraction */,
  "sand_sf_mid" REAL /* Measurement of mid sand sample fraction */,
  "sand_sf_outer" REAL /* Measurement of outer sand sample fraction */,
  "slate_sf_inner" REAL /* Measurement of inner slate sample fraction */,
  "slate_sf_mid" REAL /* Measurement of mid slate sample fraction */,
  "slate_sf_outer" REAL /* Measurement of outer slate sample fraction */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the sample */,
  "geological_context" TEXT /* Geological context of the sample */,
  "sampling_tool" TEXT /* Tool used for sampling */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during sampling */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the geological site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the site */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the site and its geological significance */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of geological site (e.g., outcrop, quarry, etc.) */,
  "geological_formation" TEXT /* Geological formation of the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site above sea level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation or organization the researcher belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being logged */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the measurement was taken */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who took the measurement */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was logged */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_logs_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being analyzed */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample analyzed (e.g., sand, slate, etc.) */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_analysis_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the measurement */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted to the user (e.g., read-only, edit, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report entry */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being reported */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed, etc.) */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization entry */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being visualized */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was generated */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., graph, chart, etc.) */,
  "image" TEXT /* Image of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)
